ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data_regions" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing regions table */,
  "week_start" TEXT /* Start date of the week for the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the year */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing age_groups table */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing metrics table */,
  "vax_status_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing vax_statuses table */,
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing metric_types table */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data source
Start date of the week for the data
Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, researcher)
